title: Craftable Orbital Strike Cannon_
description:
This is a mod which allows you to craft orbital strike cannons.

It's a great way to play with friends and wreak havoc in your world.

It is in the form of a 'stab shot' and isn't to expensive to craft.

/give @s orbitalstrike:orbital_strike_laser
body:
⚠️ 1.21 mod only, doesn't support other versions. ⚠️

This mod allows users to create a stab shot -  The cannon is controlled using a custom-crafted item, in the form of a 1-durability fishing rod. Right-clicking the rod establishes an explosion of 80 TNT on the targeted block from up to 250 blocks away where you look at, typically to bedrock.

It can be crafted as follows, in any order:

1 Redstone Block
1 Netherite Ingot
1 Eye of Ender

You can also use a /give command to get the item,

which is:

/give @s orbitalstrike:orbital_strike_laser

There is no cooldown, so you can spam the cannon.


Wreak havoc & Have fun! (don't ruin your friendsips!)
